# Welcome {.unnumbered}

<!-- {.unnumbered} prevents index.qmd from consuming a chapter number, so
     chapters/01-introduction.qmd renders as "Chapter 1". To make index.qmd
     numbered Chapter 1 instead, remove {.unnumbered} and rename chapter files
     (01-… → 02-…) to stay in sync with the rendered numbers. -->

Brief course description — what this course is about and who it is for.

## Learning Objectives {.unnumbered}

After completing this course, students will be able to:

- Objective 1
- Objective 2
- Objective 3

## Schedule {.unnumbered}

| Week | Chapter | Topic |
|------|---------|-------|
| 1    | 1       | Introduction |

## How to Use This Script {.unnumbered}

The slides used in class are available at: [slides/](../slides/)

Personal notes and organizational remarks are not included in this published version.
